response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and web-focused engineer with 15+ years across TypeScript, Node.js, and related web technologies, but he does not meet the core requirements for this role. Most critically, he has no Japanese language proficiency whatsoever — a hard requirement — and his background shows no meaningful experience in embedded networking, LAN-switch firmware, security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X), or Linux kernel development. His C/C++ exposure is minimal and dated (NI LabWindows in 2014–2015, a university thesis), far below the depth needed for embedded security firmware work.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Some foundational C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows, embedded sound synthesis thesis) indicating baseline low-level awareness
Linux familiarity through DevOps and open-source project work
concerns: Zero Japanese language proficiency — a non-negotiable hard requirement for this role
No experience with embedded networking, LAN-switch products, or security protocols such as MACsec, 802.1X, or Captive Portal
No Linux kernel investigation or source-level modification experience; virtually all work is application/web layer
